description_long: This is a large, L-shaped wooden bunk bed unit with three sleeping surfaces: two stacked bunks and a perpendicular single bed at the top. The frame is constructed from light-colored wood with smooth, flat panels and features a built-in black wardrobe or storage cabinet at one end. Each bed is equipped with a patterned gray mattress, white pillows, and minimal bedding. A small black ladder provides access to the upper bunk, and the beds are set on a black rectangular platform that likely represents a rug or base. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for shared urban living spaces such as dormitories or hostels. The structure appears robust and is designed to maximize sleeping capacity in a compact footprint.
description: A modern, L-shaped wooden bunk bed unit with three beds, a built-in wardrobe, and a black ladder, all set on a black platform. The beds feature gray patterned mattresses and white pillows, ideal for shared urban spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the L-shaped configuration, the black wardrobe at the end, and the ladder leading to the upper bunk, with pillows and bedding visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the bunk beds, the perpendicular single bed, and the full length of the black platform base.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a clear look at the stacked bunks and the side paneling of the frame, with all three beds and their bedding visible.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the foot of the beds, showing the end panels, the wardrobe, and the arrangement of pillows and bedding.
